gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/317)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/317)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَأْخُذُ الْإِنْسَانُ مِنْ طِينِ قَبْرِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) فَيَنْتَفِعُ بِهِ وَ يَأْخُذُ غَيْرُهُ وَ لَا يَنْتَفِعُ بِهِ فَقَالَ لَا وَ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ مَا يَأْخُذُهُ أَحَدٌ وَ هُوَ يَرَى أَنَّ اللَّهَ يَنْفَعُهُ بِهِ إِلَّا نَفَعَهُ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Karram, from Ibn Abu Yafour who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The human being takes from the clay of the grave of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, so he would benefit by it, and others take and do not benefit by it?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No! By the One<sup>azwj</sup> Who, there is no god except for Him<sup>azwj</sup>, no one would take it but believing that Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Benefit him by it, for sure he would benefit by it’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from ibn Faddal from Karram from ibn abu Ya’fur who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘How is it that certain people take some soil from the gravesite of al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and benefit thereby, but others do not benefit thereby?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘No, by Allah, beside whom no one deserves worship, that is not the case. If one takes such soil with belief that Allah will benefit him thereby, He will certainly benefit him thereby.’”
